'''R2-D1''' was an [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|R2-series]] [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]]. [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Amidala's]] [[J-type 327 Nubian royal starship/Legends|royal starship]] held a complement of droids, one of which was R2-D1.<ref name="SWI94">{{InsiderCite|94|Set Piece|Set Piece: Naboo Royal Starship}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Various sources indicate the six droids onboard the Royal Starship in {{Film|I}} were R2-D2, [[R2-B1/Legends|R2-B1]], [[R2-R9/Legends|R2-R9]], [[R2-N3/Legends|R2-N3]], [[R2-M5/Legends|R2-M5]], and [[G8-R3/Legends|G8-R3]].<ref name="TPMVD">''[[Star Wars: The Phantom Menace: The Expanded Visual Dictionary]]''</ref> A single source, a "[[Set Piece]]" article in [[Star Wars Insider 94|''Star Wars Insider'' 94]], replaces the name of R2 unit [[R2-M5/Legends|R2-M5]] with R2-D1. This is likely a contradicted alternate name for the same droid.<ref name="SWI94" />
